title: Reaumuria oxiana
taxonomy: Reaumuria oxiana is classified as a member of the family Chenopodiaceae, which is now commonly referred to as Amaranthaceae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its relationships with other species. As a member of the Amaranthaceae family, Reaumuria oxiana is further grouped into the genus Reaumuria. Within the genus, it is specifically classified as Reaumuria oxiana. Its classification is subject to ongoing research and potential revisions in the field of botany.
uses: Reaumuria oxiana is known for its potential medicinal uses, primarily in traditional medicine.
